@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "beads_rust"
-version = "0.1.30"
+version = "0.1.31"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.88"
 description = "Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"
@@ -46,21 +46,21 @@ clap_complete = { version = "4.5.66", features = ["unstable-dynamic"] }
 
 # Database (pure-Rust SQLite with concurrent writer support)
 # NOTE: transitive fsqlite workspace deps listed explicitly so rch syncs them
-fsqlite = "0.1.1"
-fsqlite-types = "0.1.1"
-fsqlite-error = "0.1.1"
-fsqlite-core = "0.1.1"
-fsqlite-func = "0.1.1"
-fsqlite-vdbe = "0.1.1"
-fsqlite-vfs = "0.1.2"
-fsqlite-pager = "0.1.1"
-fsqlite-parser = "0.1.1"
-fsqlite-planner = "0.1.1"
-fsqlite-wal = "0.1.1"
-fsqlite-btree = "0.1.1"
-fsqlite-ast = "0.1.1"
-fsqlite-mvcc = "0.1.1"
-fsqlite-observability = "0.1.1"
+fsqlite = "0.1.2"
+fsqlite-types = "0.1.2"
+fsqlite-error = "0.1.2"
+fsqlite-core = "0.1.2"
+fsqlite-func = "0.1.2"
+fsqlite-vdbe = "0.1.2"
+fsqlite-vfs = "0.1.3"
+fsqlite-pager = "0.1.2"
+fsqlite-parser = "0.1.2"
+fsqlite-planner = "0.1.2"
+fsqlite-wal = "0.1.2"
+fsqlite-btree = "0.1.2"
+fsqlite-ast = "0.1.2"
+fsqlite-mvcc = "0.1.2"
+fsqlite-observability = "0.1.2"
 
 # Serialization
 serde = { version = "1.0.228", features = ["derive"] }

@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # To install from AUR: yay -S br-bin
 
 pkgname=br-bin
-pkgver=0.1.13
+pkgver=0.1.31
 pkgrel=1
 pkgdesc="Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"
 arch=('x86_64' 'aarch64')

@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@ class Br < Formula
   desc "Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"
   homepage "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust"
   license "MIT"
-  version "0.1.13"
+  version "0.1.31"
 
   on_macos do
     on_arm do
